data_coverage_summary: Oracle Cloud SCM/Retail/TMS APIs has public documentation that indicates warehouse execution and inventory workflows across inventory, bins, tasks, shipments. Public Oracle SaaS REST/API docs.
buyer_guidance: Use this surface for warehouse execution and inventory workflows rather than telemetry or sensor data ingestion. Oracle should be treated as a rest api surface for warehouse execution and inventory workflows.
overview: Public documentation reviewed for Oracle Cloud SCM/Retail/TMS APIs indicates Public Oracle SaaS REST/API docs. The documented surface aligns with warehouse execution and inventory workflows and covers inventory, bins, tasks, shipments. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The public documentation indicates warehouse workflows around inventory, locations, pick tasks, receipts, and shipping state.

ingest_considerations: The public source for Oracle Cloud SCM/Retail/TMS APIs is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as warehouse execution and inventory workflows, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.
